content_body: Thank you so much for our stay in your beautiful home on the river. Everything was perfect, and that hot tub was put to good use. We loved the game room downstairs—lots of bets were made and lots of money was lost. We walked down to the river, and we are very thankful for your stairs (because we won’t have to work out for weeks now). Thank you so much for sharing your home and we would love to come back!
title: Would LOVE To Come Back!
